scripts.api:generate: openapi-generator-cli generate -i ../backend/openapi/schema.yaml -g typescript-angular -o src/app/core/api/generated --additional-properties=ngVersion=21,supportsES6=true,withInterfaces=true && rm -f src/app/core/api/generated/README.md src/app/core/api/generated/git_push.sh
scripts.api:generate:local: cd ../backend && ./venv/bin/python manage.py spectacular --file openapi/schema.yaml && cd ../frontend && npm run api:generate
